host.title: HomeSeer Host
host.description: IP address or hostname of your HS4 server

lanAccess.title: LAN Access Allowed (no login required)
lanAccess.description: If HomeSeer allows unauthenticated access from the local network, enable this. If disabled, username and password are required.

username.title: HomeSeer Username
username.description: Required if LAN Access is disabled

password.title: HomeSeer Password
password.description: Required if LAN Access is disabled

asciiPort.title: HS4 ASCII Event Stream Port
asciiPort.description: Port for the HomeSeer ASCII event stream (default 11000)

homebridgeIp.title: Homebridge IP Address
homebridgeIp.description: IP address of this Homebridge server (used to build the Device Selection Page link)

uiPort.title: Device Selection UI Port
uiPort.description: Port for the device selection page (default 8583)

ignoreBattery.title: Ignore Battery Devices
ignoreBattery.description: Exclude devices identified as battery sensors from HomeKit

layout.helpvalue:
OPEN DEVICE SELECTION PAGE
Replace "localhost" with your Homebridge IP if needed
